title: Lead Instructional Designer at Delhi University

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Delhi University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Delhi University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Coimbatore-based team.

About Delhi University:
Delhi University is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhi University!
